LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE APRIL-11-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT AIRHOUSE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR PLAINTIFF'S NONCOMPLIANCE WITH LOCAL RULE 2.7(B) (COURTESY COPIES). AFTER A MEET-AND-CONFER, HEARING MAY BE RE-SET FOR A MONDAY-THURSDAY AFTER APRIL 25. PLAINTIFF'S NEW PAPERS SHALL STATE THE NEW HEARING DATE ON CAPTION PAGES. DEFENDANTS NEED NOT RE-FILE THEIR PAPERS. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-10-2024 Continued To Aug-07-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-11-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT AIRHOUSE, INC.'s DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Ordered off calendar for plaintiff's noncompliance with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies). After a meet-and-confer, hearing may be re-set for a Monday-Thursday after April 25. Plaintiff's new papers shall state the new hearing date on caption pages. Defendants need not re-file their papers.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-11-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT AIRHOUSE, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Ordered off calendar for plaintiff's noncompliance with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies). After a meet-and-confer, hearing may be re-set for a Monday-Thursday after April 25. Plaintiff's new papers shall state the new hearing date on caption pages. Defendants need not re-file their papers.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
